chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-6155 of 2015 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For order on Misc. No.32764/15 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on Misc. No.30747/15 (Ex/A) 4. For order on Misc. No.30748/15 (Stay/A) 5. For hearing of Main Case -------------------------------------- 20.10.2015. Mr. Qadir Hussain Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Domki, advocate for K-Electric. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Upheld. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-5. Petitioner is aggrieved against the excessive billing raised by the respondents. On the very face of it, this petition is found to be not maintainable as remedy of the petitioner in respect of excessive billing lies with the Electric Inspector under Section 26 of Electricity Act, 1910. Petitioner is, therefore directed to approach the Electric Inspector for redressal of his grievance. This petition being devoid of any merit is dismissed in limine along with the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
